ground_truth.title: Explainable AI for Consumer Credit Decisions: SHAP Values and Regulatory Compliance
ground_truth.abstract: We apply SHAP-based explanations to gradient boosting credit models and evaluate whether model-agnostic explanations satisfy adverse action notice requirements under the Fair Credit Reporting Act.
